My Music
Collection Wantlist Stats About
Collection Wantlist Stats About
Home / About

About

This is a portable, standalone export of a Discogs record collection — a self-contained set of pages you can browse offline. There's no database or live API here; everything you see was baked in when the site was generated.

Data provided by Discogs. Discogs® is a trademark of Zink Media, LLC. This project is for personal use.

Key features

  • Fast, offline browsing of the full collection and wantlist.
  • Release detail pages with tracklist, credits, companies, identifiers, videos, and release notes.
  • Image gallery with a lightbox viewer on every release.
  • Search across artist and title, plus year:1980 or year:1980..1989 ranges.
  • Sorts: Added date, Year, Artist, Title, and Rating.
  • Collection statistics by artist, genre, decade, and format.

Search tips

Use the header search box on the collection page. Examples:

  • miles davis kind of blue — free text across artist and title.
  • year:1980 or year:1980..1989 — single year or range.

Tip: the year prefix accepts a space after the colon (e.g., year: 1980).

Sorting

  • Default: Added (newest first).
  • Other options: Year, Artist, Title, and Rating.
Powered by Discogs API & Coffee Since 2026 | Lovingly Crafted in Boise, Idaho
